Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.transformer

package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.transformer
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    LanguageFilter
    Implements sequent filtering to a restricted language.
    SequentDatatypeTranslator
    Sequent transformer that translates occurrences of datatypes in the predicates of the sequent on which it is applied.
    SequentExtensionRemover
    Sequent transformer that removes any predicate that cannot be translated to the plain mathematical language, i.e., that contains non WD-strict extensions.
    SequentExtensionTranslator
    Sequent transformer that translates occurrences of extensions in the predicates of the sequent on which it is applied.
    SequentSimplifier
    Transformer that simplifies a sequent by applying logical simplification rules,
    SimpleSequent
    In practice, hypotheses are always before the goal in predicates , however this is not part of the published interface.
    TrackedPredicate
